name: Strathfield
heroAlt: Open-plan kitchen and living joinery fitout reference suited to Strathfield family homes
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Renovations Strathfield | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Custom kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and joinery-led renovations for Strathfield family homes. Free quotes. Call InsideOut Joinery on 02 5000 0402.
intro: Strathfield homes are typically well-built family properties where the original layout is sound but the joinery has not kept up with how the home is actually used. Kitchens that were designed around a different era of cooking and storage, wardrobes that were never built properly, and laundries that never had enough bench space are the most common starting points. The goal is joinery that suits the scale of the home and the way the family lives in it — not cabinetry that looks good in a showroom but does not work in practice.
localContext: Strathfield homes often have generous room proportions that reward good joinery planning. A kitchen with the right island configuration and a well-thought-out pantry storage system can change how the whole ground floor of the house functions. We focus on getting that planning right before any material selections are made.
projectReferenceNote: The Epping fitout is a strong reference for Strathfield family homes — the same open-plan kitchen and living dynamic, the same need for integrated pantry and study storage, and the same emphasis on joinery that ties multiple rooms together rather than treating them separately.
whyChoose: Family home joinery experience with kitchens planned around how the home is actually used day to day
Open-plan kitchen, pantry and living-room storage planned as one connected scope
Wardrobe and laundry solutions that solve real daily storage problems rather than just filling wall space
A practical quote process that starts with layout and function before moving to finishes

faqs.question: Do you take on kitchen renovations in Strathfield?
faqs.answer: Yes. Kitchen renovations in family homes are a core part of what we do — including open-plan layouts, island configurations and integrated pantry and appliance storage.

faqs.question: Can you plan the kitchen and wardrobes together as one scope?
faqs.answer: Yes. Planning multiple rooms together allows the joinery to share one material and detailing direction, which usually produces a more resolved result across the home.

faqs.question: How do you approach the layout before selecting finishes?
faqs.answer: We always start with the layout — how the room is used, where the appliances and services sit, and what storage the family actually needs. Finishes come after the plan is right. Getting the sequence wrong is one of the most common reasons renovations do not work as well as they should.

faqs.question: Can you start from inspiration photos and rough dimensions?
faqs.answer: Yes. Inspiration references and a rough sense of the scope are enough to get started. We follow up with a site measure to nail down the details before anything is finalised.

ctaText: If you are planning a kitchen renovation or a multi-room joinery fitout in Strathfield, send through your plans, photos or ideas and we can help work out the right approach.
